시편 34:1.content: I will bless Yahweh at all times. His praise will always be in my mouth.

시편 34:2.content: My soul shall boast in Yahweh. The humble shall hear of it and be glad.

시편 34:3.content: Oh magnify Yahweh with me. Let’s exalt his name together.

시편 34:4.content: I sought Yahweh, and he answered me, and delivered me from all my fears.

시편 34:5.content: They looked to him, and were radiant. Their faces shall never be covered with shame.

시편 34:6.content: This poor man cried, and Yahweh heard him, and saved him out of all his troubles.

시편 34:7.content: Yahweh’s angel encamps around those who fear him, and delivers them.

시편 34:8.content: Oh taste and see that Yahweh is good. Blessed is the man who takes refuge in him.

시편 34:9.content: Oh fear Yahweh, you his saints, for there is no lack with those who fear him.

시편 34:10.content: The young lions do lack, and suffer hunger, but those who seek Yahweh shall not lack any good thing.

시편 34:11.content: Come, you children, listen to me. I will teach you the fear of Yahweh.

시편 34:12.content: Who is someone who desires life, and loves many days, that he may see good?

시편 34:13.content: Keep your tongue from evil, and your lips from speaking lies.

시편 34:14.content: Depart from evil, and do good. Seek peace, and pursue it.

시편 34:15.content: Yahweh’s eyes are toward the righteous. His ears listen to their cry.

시편 34:16.content: Yahweh’s face is against those who do evil, to cut off their memory from the earth.

시편 34:17.content: The righteous cry, and Yahweh hears, and delivers them out of all their troubles.

시편 34:18.content: Yahweh is near to those who have a broken heart, and saves those who have a crushed spirit.

시편 34:19.content: Many are the afflictions of the righteous, but Yahweh delivers him out of them all.

시편 34:20.content: He protects all of his bones. Not one of them is broken.

시편 34:21.content: Evil shall kill the wicked. Those who hate the righteous shall be condemned.

시편 34:22.content: Yahweh redeems the soul of his servants. None of those who take refuge in him shall be condemned.
